description: Manage citation tracking: discover, list, and add papers.
Create a podcast from a URL or PDF attachment.
Search the web via Kagi (or DuckDuckGo with ddg prefix).
List chapters or generate audio from a magazine chapter.
Extract and save line items from a receipt (attach image/PDF).
Clear conversation context for this chat (history is preserved in the database).
Track a meal and look up nutritional info (e.g. /tm dal makhani 200gms or /tm samosa 2). Use /tm summary [mar 15] for a daily nutrition report.
